name: Glamour Riot
short_description: This is an absurd and humorous action game where you play as a beauty pageant star. With an innocent, delicate face, a sexy and alluring figure, and all sorts of shady, underhanded tricks, you’ll fight for victory, wealth, and fame.
detailed_description:
You will play as a beauty pageant star, relying on an innocent and delicate face, a sexy and alluring body, and all kinds of shady, dirty tricks to win victory, wealth, and fame.

Beauty Pageant Competition

Sign up for the beauty pageant at the TV station and fight your way from the community all the way to the national finals. You will take turns with other contestants to walk the runway and perform, earning points through your gait, makeup, and movements. But that's not the main point. The real focus is to ruthlessly beat up your competitors backstage—pull out their hair, kick off their shoes, smear their bodies and faces with lipstick, hit them with blunt objects to give them concussions, make them unable to walk steadily, and embarrass them in front of everyone. You can also wear an absurd mask to impersonate them on stage, damaging their reputation. Or, you can beat them so badly that they become furious and forget to go on stage. You might even tie them all up and throw them on the ground, giving yourself time to head to the bar, pick up a side quest, and use your beauty to seduce those foolish customers and sell them drinks for extra cash. If you’re already certain of victory and don’t even feel like going on stage, you can just kick in the power box and end the whole competition early.

Fitness Livestream

Work out in the gym while livestreaming. Change your exercise speed from time to time, fully displaying your beautiful curves and sweaty, sexy body. Pose seductively in front of the camera, using all kinds of provocative angles to attract viewers to send you gifts. Just like a femme fatale in disguise, you watch the number of viewers and the pile of gifts continue to grow, and flash a knowing smile.

Horseback Riding Competition

Participate in a scream-filled indoor horseback riding competition. Ride from one end of the hall to the other, flailing around on horseback, shaking your body exaggeratedly to earn loud cheers from the audience. At the same time, use your feet to kick every opponent you pass right back home.

Photo Shoot

Accept all kinds of photography assignments at the studio. Pose your character in various seductive positions in front of the camera, personally capture those brilliant moments, and earn shooting fees and reward items.

House Decoration

Purchase furniture and items to decorate your house. You can also win decorative items in competitions. Wallpapers and lighting can be freely changed. Let your character lounge on the sofa in various poses or enjoy a relaxing bath in the bathtub.

Collecting, Upgrading, and Modifying Equipment

Obtain all kinds of swimsuits, hairstyles, shoes, jewelry, and other equipment through competition rewards or lucky draws in the shop. Carefully select equipment attributes that suit you, use items to upgrade your gear, and combine or modify different pieces. Create your exclusive, dazzling battle outfit.

Plastic Surgery

Go to the cosmetic surgery hospital to change your face, eye color, enhance your breasts and buttocks, or even get a whole new blue skin.

Note: As we are constantly updating new gameplay and content, the shop introduction may not be updated in time. For more gameplay details beyond the above introduction, please refer to videos, update notes, or try the game demo.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Indonesian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Romanian, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Korean
